zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Ferrers於1315年4月20日出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾格洛比時，她的父親William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby43歲，母親Margaret Segrave41歲。她於1335年4月20日與Edward Despenser I在英國萊希斯特斯爾格洛比結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1367年8月8日在她的家鄉享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Ferrers于1315年4月20日出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾格洛比时，她的父亲William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby43岁，母亲Margaret Segrave41岁。她于1335年4月20日与Edward Despenser I在英国萊希斯特斯爾格洛比结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1367年8月8日在她的家乡享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Ferrers was born on 20 April 1315, in Groby, Leicestershire, England, her father, William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby, was 43 and her mother, Margaret Segrave, was 41. She married Edward Despenser I on 20 April 1335, in Groby, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died on 8 August 1367, in her hometown, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Ferrers est née le 20 avril 1315, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Margaret Segrave, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Despenser I le 20 avril 1335, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée le 8 août 1367, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Ferrers am 20. April 1315 in Groby, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby 43 und ihre Mutter Margaret Segrave 41. Sie hat am 20. April 1335 in Groby, Leicestershire, England Edward Despenser I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb am 8. August 1367 im Alter von 52 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

Lei sposato Edward Despenser I il 20 aprile 1335, nel Groby, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 8 agosto 1367, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Ferrersが1315年4月20日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーで生まれた時，父William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Grobyは43歳，母Margaret Segraveは41歳であった。1335年4月20日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーでEdward Despenser Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1367年8月8日に故郷で52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Ferrers(이)가 1315년 4월 20일 영국 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Segrave(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1335년 4월 20일 영국 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 Edward Despenser I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1367년 8월 8일 그녀의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Edward Despenser I em 20 de abril de 1335, em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Ferrers родилась 20 апреля 1315 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Segrave, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Despenser I 20 апреля 1335 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла 8 августа 1367 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 52 лет.

Se casó con Edward Despenser I el 20 de abril de 1335, en Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 8 de agosto de 1367, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años.
